channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: ICE should keep making traffic stops despite recent shootings, Trump says
item.description: President Donald Trump says Immigration and Customs Enforcement officers should continue vehicle stops despite recent fatal shootings.

item.title: Report: Detainees at ICE facility in Texas report frequent beatings and other human rights abuses
Heavy rains keep drenching South Texas, tornado reported in San Antonio
